text:
On Mon, Oct 22, 2012 at 03:56:20PM +0200, Guido Falsi wrote:
> hi,
> 
> I have made two changes:
> 
> - converted to optionsng
> - added files/patch-uhidd-usb_hid_usage to fix build on clang
> 
> Can you approve these patches or suggest some alternative solution to
> the second problem?
> 
> Thanks for you work!

Hi Guido,

The patch looks quite good and I also like the way the second problem
is solved.

Thanks for your time! Patch approved!

Kai
